name: No-Bake Peanut Butter Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar, margarine, flour and milk.
2. Bring to a full boil and boil hard for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and add remaining ingredients all at once.
4. Blend well.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto foil or greased cookie sheets.
6. Cool completely before serving or storing.
